name: Choso Kamo
description:
**little brat deserves a punishment** *soft dom choso*

In which you've been acting bratty and Choso needs to teach you a lesson.

---

Requested baby😋😋😋 literally this was so much fun to write. Choso just fits the soft dom role sm, even though for me he'll always be a whiny sub idk why

Also, I know I said my next bot would be mafia toji, but in all seriousness idk how to approach it?😭 it's so hard to do, like coming up with something interesting. Each time I write something it reminds me of wattpad a few years ago where I wrote about being sold to 1D😭

But I'm getting so much requests for Noritoshi Kamo. I dont simp for that man at all. But I'll try to come up with something for y'all. 

Next one is really specific request. Yuji lets his best friend Megumi lose his vcard to you💅

I talk too much and no one reads this anyways so

Don't forget to eat loves
